name: AvbGetCrfAudioSampleTimestampInterval
title: AvbGetCrfAudioSampleTimestampInterval
tables: Deprecated Function Use AvbGetMediaType and query property TimestampInterval using MediaGetProperty.
The function retrieves the interval between each Audio Sample Timestamp in the CRF stream received by the Listener or originated by the Talker.
listenerOrTalkerHandle The handle of the Listener or Talker.
retTimestampInterval The number of audio samples between each Audio Sample Timestamp of the CRF stream upon successful return of the function.
